zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Throckmorton於大約1472年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton61歲，母親Margaret Olney47歲。她於1500年與Sir Richard Clark在英國諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年1月13日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德享年76歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Throckmorton于大约1472年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton61岁，母亲Margaret Olney47岁。她于1500年与Sir Richard Clark在英国諾薩普頓史爾庫廷哈爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年1月13日在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德享年76岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾布盧可斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Throckmorton was born about 1472, in Warwickshire, England, her father, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, was 61 and her mother, Margaret Olney, was 47. She married Sir Richard Clark in 1500, in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 13 January 1547, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England.

fr.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Throckmorton est née environ 1472, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Margaret Olney, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Clark en 1500, à Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 janvier 1547, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Brooksby, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Throckmorton um 1472 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton 61 und ihre Mutter Margaret Olney 47. Sie hat 1500 in Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England Sir Richard Clark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Januar 1547 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brooksby, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Throckmorton è nata il circa 1472 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, aveva 61 anni e sua madre, Margaret Olney, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Clark nel 1500, nel Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 gennaio 1547, nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Brooksby, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Throckmortonが約1472年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughtonは61歳，母Margaret Olneyは47歳であった。1500年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアコウルティーンハルでSir Richard Clarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年1月13日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで76歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルークスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: 영국 수폴크 소우스 엘함 스트 피터
ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Throckmorton(이)가 대략 1472년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Olney(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 노르섬프토실르 쿠르티홀에서 Sir Richard Clark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 1월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 브룩스비에 묻혔다.

pt.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Throckmorton nasceu aproximadamente 1472, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Olney, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Clark em 1500, em Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de janeiro de 1547, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Brooksby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.South Elmham St Peter, Suffolk, England: соут элмхам ст питир, суффолк, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Throckmorton родилась около 1472 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Olney, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Clark в 1500 г. в местности коуртинолл, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 января 1547 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности бруксби, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Throckmorton nació aproximadamente 1472, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Throckmorton II, Lord of Coughton, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Margaret Olney, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Clark en 1500, en Courteenhall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de enero de 1547, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Brooksby, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
